title: C-MOJ - Cringy's Modpack of Justice
description: This project adds some fun and adventurous mods that I wish I had more time to play with if I had more time to play modded Minecraft rather than vanilla.
body:
Experience Minecraft in an epic new way with new structures, the Aether dimension, immersive Nether and End Portals, new equipment, and beautiful visuals.

C-MOJ is a modpack I have put together with just a few mods that I've always found fascinating and fun to mess around with, without totally over-loading the game with new content.
